headline: Dispersive® Stealth Networking Powers Secure GPU-as-a-Service at the Edge as AI Demand Outpaces Infrastructure
summary: ATLANTA, March 09, 2026--Dispersive Holdings, Inc. (Dispersive), the leader in stealth networking for ultra-secure, high-performance communications, today announced the successful completion of a multi-month pilot with the American Tower Edge Data Center in Raleigh, NC, demonstrating measurable gains in performance, security, and resiliency for Artificial Intelligence (AI) and other high-performance workloads at the edge.

content.title: Dispersive® Stealth Networking Powers Secure GPU-as-a-Service at the Edge as AI Demand Outpaces Infrastructure
